steps.title: Support influence beyond copies
steps.content: The student's hypothesis is that Gidra's influence cannot be measured only by the 4,000 newsletters printed each month. A supporting finding must show that readership or reach could extend beyond the number of copies.

steps.title: Reject details about creation or content
steps.content: Choice A concerns funding. Choice B concerns art and literature in the newsletter. Choice C gives a location at UC Berkeley. None shows reach beyond circulation. If readers passed copies to others, one copy could influence multiple people. The answer is D.
